description: You are a private investigator using a local HTML visualization tool in Tor Browser. Navigate to file:///home/ga/Documents/OfflineTools/chart_tool.html and export the chart data as a Base64 string. You must grant a permanent exception for canvas data extraction in Tor Browser for this local file to ensure the full data is captured. Save the resulting Base64 string to /home/ga/Documents/OfflineTools/exported_chart.txt.
